question: 统计每个电影分类下的影片数量，并按数量降序排列，只显示影片数量超过50部的分类
sql: SELECT c.name AS 分类名称, COUNT(fc.film_id) AS 影片数量 FROM public.category c JOIN public.film_category fc ON c.category_id = fc.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name HAVING COUNT(fc.film_id) > 50 ORDER BY 影片数量 DESC;

question: 查询所有尚未归还的租赁记录，返回客户姓名、电影标题、租赁日期、门店编号及员工姓名，并按租赁日期倒序排列
sql: SELECT cu.first_name || ' ' || cu.last_name AS 客户姓名, f.title AS 电影标题, r.rental_date AS 租赁日期, s.store_id AS 门店编号, st.first_name || ' ' || st.last_name AS 员工姓名 FROM public.rental r JOIN public.customer cu ON r.customer_id = cu.customer_id JOIN public.inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id JOIN public.film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id JOIN public.store s ON i.store_id = s.store_id JOIN public.staff st ON r.staff_id = st.staff_id WHERE r.return_date IS NULL ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC;

question: 列出所有国家及其下属城市数量，仅包含城市数大于10个的国家，并按城市数量降序排序
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家名称, COUNT(ci.city_id) AS 城市数量 FROM public.country co JOIN public.city ci ON co.country_id = ci.country_id GROUP BY co.country_id, co.country HAVING COUNT(ci.city_id) > 10 ORDER BY 城市数量 DESC;

question: 查询所有活跃客户（active=1）的姓名、邮箱和创建日期，并按创建日期降序排列
sql: SELECT first_name AS 姓名, last_name AS 姓氏, email AS 邮箱, create_date AS 创建日期 FROM public.customer WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY create_date DESC;

question: 统计每个门店（store_id）下的客户总数及其中活跃客户（active=1）数量，并仅显示客户数超过100的门店
sql: SELECT store_id AS 门店ID, COUNT(*) AS 客户总数, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active = 1) AS 活跃客户数 FROM public.customer GROUP BY store_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 100;

question: 找出姓氏以字母'S'开头且账户处于启用状态（activebool=true）的前10位客户，返回其全名、邮箱和最后更新时间
sql: SELECT first_name AS 名字, last_name AS 姓氏, email AS 邮箱, last_update AS 最后更新时间 FROM public.customer WHERE last_name LIKE 'S%' AND activebool = true ORDER BY last_update DESC LIMIT 10;

question: 对比分析：统计启用账户（activebool=true）与禁用账户（activebool=false）的客户数量及平均活跃状态值（active字段）
sql: SELECT activebool AS 账户启用状态, COUNT(*) AS 客户数量, AVG(active::numeric) AS 平均活跃状态值 FROM public.customer GROUP BY activebool;

question: 查询2006年创建的所有客户中，按姓氏分组的客户数量排行榜（取前5），要求排除姓氏为空的记录
sql: SELECT last_name AS 姓氏, COUNT(*) AS 客户数量 FROM public.customer WHERE create_date >= '2006-01-01' AND create_date < '2007-01-01' AND last_name IS NOT NULL AND last_name != '' GROUP BY last_name ORDER BY 客户数量 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 列出地址ID未关联（address_id为NULL）或关联无效地址的客户信息（需左连接address表验证），返回客户ID、姓名、邮箱及地址ID
sql: SELECT c.customer_id AS 客户ID, c.first_name AS 名字, c.last_name AS 姓氏, c.email AS 邮箱, c.address_id AS 地址ID FROM public.customer c LEFT JOIN public.address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id WHERE c.address_id IS NULL OR a.address_id IS NULL;

question: 计算每月新增客户数（按create_date年月分组），并标注当月活跃客户占比（active=1客户数/当月总客户数）
sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(create_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS 年月, COUNT(*) AS 新增客户数, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active = 1)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2) AS 活跃客户占比 FROM public.customer GROUP BY TO_CHAR(create_date, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY 年月;

question: 找出同时满足以下条件的客户：邮箱包含'sakilacustomer.org'、账户启用（activebool=true）、且last_update在2013年之后，返回其全名、邮箱和最后更新时间
sql: SELECT first_name AS 名字, last_name AS 姓氏, email AS 邮箱, last_update AS 最后更新时间 FROM public.customer WHERE email LIKE '%sakilacustomer.org' AND activebool = true AND last_update > '2013-12-31' ORDER BY last_update DESC;

question: 查询每个客户姓氏（last_name）出现频次大于等于5次的姓氏列表，并按频次降序排列
sql: SELECT last_name AS 姓氏, COUNT(*) AS 出现次数 FROM public.customer GROUP BY last_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY 出现次数 DESC;

question: 获取最近30天内被更新过的客户中，按门店ID分组的客户数量、平均活跃状态（active字段）及最新一次更新时间
sql: SELECT store_id AS 门店ID, COUNT(*) AS 客户数量, ROUND(AVG(active::numeric), 2) AS 平均活跃状态, MAX(last_update) AS 最近更新时间 FROM public.customer WHERE last_update >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY 最近更新时间 DESC;

question: 列出所有门店及其经理的姓名、邮箱和启用状态，并按门店ID升序排列
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, st.first_name AS 经理名, st.last_name AS 经理姓, st.email AS 经理邮箱, st.active AS 启用状态 FROM public.store s JOIN public.staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id ORDER BY s.store_id;

question: 统计每个门店的员工总数（含经理）及其中启用员工数量，并仅显示员工总数大于1的门店
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, COUNT(st.staff_id) AS 员工总数, SUM(CASE WHEN st.active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 启用员工数 FROM public.store s LEFT JOIN public.staff st ON s.store_id = st.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id HAVING COUNT(st.staff_id) > 1 ORDER BY 员工总数 DESC;

question: 查询尚未被指派为任何门店经理的员工（即staff_id未出现在store.manager_staff_id中），返回其ID、姓名和邮箱
sql: SELECT staff_id AS 员工ID, first_name AS 名, last_name AS 姓, email AS 邮箱 FROM public.staff WHERE staff_id NOT IN (SELECT manager_staff_id FROM public.store WHERE manager_staff_id IS NOT NULL);

question: 找出每位门店经理所负责门店的地址详情（城市、国家），并按国家名称排序
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, st.first_name AS 经理名, st.last_name AS 经理姓, c.city AS 城市, co.country AS 国家 FROM public.store s JOIN public.staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id JOIN public.address a ON s.address_id = a.address_id JOIN public.city c ON a.city_id = c.city_id JOIN public.country co ON c.country_id = co.country_id ORDER BY co.country;

question: 对比两家指定门店（store_id=1和store_id=2）的员工数量、启用员工比例及平均入职更新时间（以last_update近似代表）
sql: SELECT store_id AS 门店编号, COUNT(*) AS 员工总数, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN active THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 3) AS 启用比例, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM last_update)) AS 平均时间戳数值 FROM public.staff WHERE store_id IN (1, 2) GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY 门店编号;

question: 列出所有启用状态的门店经理，按其所属门店的最后更新时间倒序排列，并显示门店ID、经理全名和更新时间
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, st.first_name AS 经理名, st.last_name AS 经理姓, s.last_update AS 门店最后更新时间 FROM public.store s JOIN public.staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id WHERE st.active = true ORDER BY s.last_update DESC;

question: 找出员工数量最多的前3家门店，并显示门店ID、地址简要信息（address字段前30字符）及员工数
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, SUBSTRING(a.address FOR 30) AS 地址摘要, COUNT(st.staff_id) AS 员工数 FROM public.store s JOIN public.address a ON s.address_id = a.address_id LEFT JOIN public.staff st ON s.store_id = st.store_id GROUP BY s.store_id, a.address ORDER BY 员工数 DESC LIMIT 3;

question: 统计每个国家下开设的门店数量，并筛选出门店数超过1家的国家，按数量降序排列
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家, COUNT(s.store_id) AS 门店数量 FROM public.store s JOIN public.address a ON s.address_id = a.address_id JOIN public.city c ON a.city_id = c.city_id JOIN public.country co ON c.country_id = co.country_id GROUP BY co.country HAVING COUNT(s.store_id) > 1 ORDER BY 门店数量 DESC;

question: 查询所有门店经理中姓氏出现频次最高的前5个姓氏及其对应经理人数
sql: SELECT st.last_name AS 姓氏, COUNT(*) AS 经理人数 FROM public.store s JOIN public.staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id GROUP BY st.last_name ORDER BY 经理人数 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 检查是否存在门店地址与经理居住地址相同的异常情况（即store.address_id = staff.address_id），返回门店ID、经理姓名及共同地址ID
sql: SELECT s.store_id AS 门店编号, st.first_name AS 经理名, st.last_name AS 经理姓, s.address_id AS 共同地址ID FROM public.store s JOIN public.staff st ON s.manager_staff_id = st.staff_id WHERE s.address_id = st.address_id;

question: 列出所有国家及其对应的城市数量，按城市数量降序排列
sql: SELECT c.country AS 国家, COUNT(ci.city_id) AS 城市数量 FROM public.country c LEFT JOIN public.city ci ON c.country_id = ci.country_id GROUP BY c.country_id, c.country ORDER BY 城市数量 DESC;

question: 查询没有关联任何城市的国家名称
sql: SELECT country AS 国家 FROM public.country WHERE country_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT country_id FROM public.city WHERE country_id IS NOT NULL);

question: 统计每个行政区（district）下的地址数量，并只显示地址数超过5个的行政区
sql: SELECT district AS 行政区, COUNT(address_id) AS 地址数量 FROM public.address WHERE district IS NOT NULL GROUP BY district HAVING COUNT(address_id) > 5 ORDER BY 地址数量 DESC;

question: 找出更新时间最早的5个城市及其所属国家名称
sql: SELECT ci.city AS 城市, co.country AS 国家, ci.last_update AS 最后更新时间 FROM public.city ci JOIN public.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id ORDER BY ci.last_update ASC LIMIT 5;

question: 对比中国和美国各自的城市数量与平均城市名称长度
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家, COUNT(ci.city_id) AS 城市数量, ROUND(AVG(LENGTH(ci.city)), 2) AS 平均城市名长度 FROM public.country co JOIN public.city ci ON co.country_id = ci.country_id WHERE co.country IN ('China', 'United States') GROUP BY co.country;

question: 查询所有包含‘New’关键字的城市名称及所在国家
sql: SELECT ci.city AS 城市, co.country AS 国家 FROM public.city ci JOIN public.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id WHERE ci.city ILIKE '%New%';

question: 列出每个国家中城市数量最多的前3个城市（按城市ID排序取前3）
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家, ci.city AS 城市, ci.city_id AS 城市ID FROM public.country co JOIN public.city ci ON co.country_id = ci.country_id WHERE ci.city_id IN (SELECT city_id FROM public.city ci2 WHERE ci2.country_id = co.country_id ORDER BY city_id DESC LIMIT 3) ORDER BY co.country, ci.city_id DESC;

question: 统计各国家下地址总数，并筛选出地址数大于100的国家
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家, COUNT(a.address_id) AS 地址总数 FROM public.country co JOIN public.city ci ON co.country_id = ci.country_id JOIN public.address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id GROUP BY co.country HAVING COUNT(a.address_id) > 100 ORDER BY 地址总数 DESC;

question: 查询电话号码不为空且邮政编码为空的地址明细，包括街道、行政区、城市和国家
sql: SELECT a.address AS 街道地址, a.district AS 行政区, ci.city AS 城市, co.country AS 国家 FROM public.address a JOIN public.city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id JOIN public.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id WHERE a.phone IS NOT NULL AND a.phone != '' AND (a.postal_code IS NULL OR a.postal_code = '') LIMIT 10;

question: 按国家分组，计算其所有城市最后更新时间的最晚值与最早值的时间差（以天为单位）
sql: SELECT co.country AS 国家, MAX(ci.last_update) AS 最晚更新时间, MIN(ci.last_update) AS 最早更新时间, CEIL(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(ci.last_update) - MIN(ci.last_update))) / 86400) AS 时间差_天 FROM public.country co JOIN public.city ci ON co.country_id = ci.country_id GROUP BY co.country_id, co.country HAVING COUNT(ci.city_id) > 1 ORDER BY 时间差_天 DESC;

question: 查询所有电影的标题、上映年份、时长和租赁单价，并按上映年份降序、时长升序排列
sql: SELECT title AS 标题, release_year AS 上映年份, length AS 时长_分钟, rental_rate AS 租赁单价_美元 FROM public.film ORDER BY release_year DESC, length ASC;

question: 统计每种电影分级（rating）的影片数量，并仅显示数量超过50部的分级
sql: SELECT rating AS 分级, COUNT(*) AS 影片数量 FROM public.film GROUP BY rating HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY 影片数量 DESC;

question: 找出租赁单价最高和最低的电影标题及对应价格
sql: SELECT title AS 标题, rental_rate AS 租赁单价_美元 FROM public.film WHERE rental_rate = (SELECT MAX(rental_rate) FROM public.film) OR rental_rate = (SELECT MIN(rental_rate) FROM public.film);

question: 计算所有电影的平均时长、平均租赁单价和平均赔偿成本，并保留两位小数
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(length), 2) AS 平均时长_分钟, ROUND(AVG(rental_rate), 2) AS 平均租赁单价_美元, ROUND(AVG(replacement_cost), 2) AS 平均赔偿成本_美元 FROM public.film;

question: 列出语言为英语的电影标题、描述和上映年份（需关联language表）
sql: SELECT f.title AS 标题, f.description AS 描述, f.release_year AS 上映年份 FROM public.film f JOIN public.language l ON f.language_id = l.language_id WHERE l.name = 'English ';

question: 查询2006年上映且分级为PG-13的电影数量，并按标题字母序返回前10部的标题和时长
sql: SELECT title AS 标题, length AS 时长_分钟 FROM public.film WHERE release_year = 2006 AND rating = 'PG-13' ORDER BY title LIMIT 10;

question: 分析各语言下电影的平均租赁单价和影片总数，结果按平均单价降序排列
sql: SELECT l.name AS 语言, COUNT(f.film_id) AS 影片总数, ROUND(AVG(f.rental_rate), 2) AS 平均租赁单价_美元 FROM public.film f JOIN public.language l ON f.language_id = l.language_id GROUP BY l.name ORDER BY 平均租赁单价_美元 DESC;

question: 找出包含‘Action’特别花絮（special_features数组中包含该元素）且时长超过120分钟的电影标题、分级和赔偿成本
sql: SELECT title AS 标题, rating AS 分级, replacement_cost AS 赔偿成本_美元 FROM public.film WHERE 'Action' = ANY(special_features) AND length > 120;

question: 对比PG级与R级电影的平均时长和平均赔偿成本，要求结果包含分级、平均时长、平均赔偿成本三列
sql: SELECT rating AS 分级, ROUND(AVG(length), 2) AS 平均时长_分钟, ROUND(AVG(replacement_cost), 2) AS 平均赔偿成本_美元 FROM public.film WHERE rating IN ('PG', 'R') GROUP BY rating;

question: 使用全文检索查找标题或简介中包含‘robot’或‘future’的电影，返回标题、上映年份和评级，并按相关性降序排序
sql: SELECT title AS 标题, release_year AS 上映年份, rating AS 分级 FROM public.film WHERE fulltext @@ to_tsquery('robot | future') ORDER BY ts_rank(fulltext, to_tsquery('robot | future')) DESC;

question: 查询每个电影分类下的影片数量，并按数量降序排列
sql: SELECT c.name AS 分类名称, COUNT(fc.film_id) AS 影片数量 FROM public.category c JOIN public.film_category fc ON c.category_id = fc.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY 影片数量 DESC;

question: 找出参演影片最多的前5位演员姓名（全名）及其参演影片数
sql: SELECT a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name AS 演员姓名, COUNT(fa.film_id) AS 参演影片数 FROM public.actor a JOIN public.film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name ORDER BY 参演影片数 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 列出所有同时属于‘Action’和‘Comedy’分类的电影标题（需关联film表获取标题）
sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.title AS 电影标题 FROM public.film f JOIN public.film_category fc1 ON f.film_id = fc1.film_id JOIN public.film_category fc2 ON f.film_id = fc2.film_id JOIN public.category c1 ON fc1.category_id = c1.category_id JOIN public.category c2 ON fc2.category_id = c2.category_id WHERE c1.name = 'Action' AND c2.name = 'Comedy';

question: 统计每个演员姓氏（last_name）出现的频次，仅显示频次大于1的姓氏
sql: SELECT last_name AS 演员姓氏, COUNT(*) AS 出现频次 FROM public.actor GROUP BY last_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY 出现频次 DESC;

question: 查询尚未被分配到任何分类的电影ID和标题（需关联film表）
sql: SELECT f.film_id AS 电影ID, f.title AS 电影标题 FROM public.film f LEFT JOIN public.film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id WHERE fc.film_id IS NULL;

question: 找出参演了至少3部‘Animation’分类影片的演员全名
sql: SELECT a.first_name || ' ' || a.last_name AS 演员姓名 FROM public.actor a JOIN public.film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id JOIN public.film_category fc ON fa.film_id = fc.film_id JOIN public.category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Animation' GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fa.film_id) >= 3;

question: 对比‘Action’与‘Horror’两个分类各自的影片平均时长（需关联film表的length字段）
sql: SELECT c.name AS 分类名称, ROUND(AVG(f.length), 2) AS 平均时长_分钟 FROM public.category c JOIN public.film_category fc ON c.category_id = fc.category_id JOIN public.film f ON fc.film_id = f.film_id WHERE c.name IN ('Action', 'Horror') GROUP BY c.name;

question: 查询所有姓氏以字母‘W’开头的演员及其参演的电影分类名称（去重），按演员姓氏、分类名称排序
sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.last_name AS 演员姓氏, a.first_name AS 演员名字, c.name AS 分类名称 FROM public.actor a JOIN public.film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id JOIN public.film_category fc ON fa.film_id = fc.film_id JOIN public.category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.last_name LIKE 'W%' ORDER BY 演员姓氏, 分类名称;

question: 找出更新时间最新的5个电影分类及其最后更新时间
sql: SELECT name AS 分类名称, last_update AS 最后更新时间 FROM public.category ORDER BY last_update DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 统计每个分类下不同首字母（小写）的演员姓氏数量，并只保留姓氏首字母为a-c的分组
sql: SELECT c.name AS 分类名称, LOWER(SUBSTRING(a.last_name, 1, 1)) AS 姓氏首字母, COUNT(DISTINCT a.actor_id) AS 演员人数 FROM public.category c JOIN public.film_category fc ON c.category_id = fc.category_id JOIN public.film_actor fa ON fc.film_id = fa.film_id JOIN public.actor a ON fa.actor_id = a.actor_id GROUP BY c.name, LOWER(SUBSTRING(a.last_name, 1, 1)) HAVING LOWER(SUBSTRING(a.last_name, 1, 1)) BETWEEN 'a' AND 'c' ORDER BY 分类名称, 姓氏首字母;

question: 查询最近30天内所有已完成归还的租赁记录，按归还时间倒序排列，显示租赁ID、客户ID、归还时间、员工ID
sql: SELECT rental_id AS 租赁ID, customer_id AS 客户ID, return_date AS 归还时间, staff_id AS 员工ID FROM public.rental WHERE return_date IS NOT NULL AND return_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY return_date DESC;

question: 统计每位员工处理的租赁单数（含未归还），按数量降序排列，仅显示前5名员工及对应单数
sql: SELECT staff_id AS 员工ID, COUNT(*) AS 租赁单数 FROM public.rental GROUP BY staff_id ORDER BY 租赁单数 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 找出尚未归还的租赁记录总数、平均租赁时长（从租赁日至今的天数）及最久未归还天数
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 未归还总数, ROUND(AVG(CURRENT_DATE - rental_date::date), 1) AS 平均租赁天数, MAX(CURRENT_DATE - rental_date::date) AS 最久未归还天数 FROM public.rental WHERE return_date IS NULL;

question: 分析各门店（通过inventory关联store_id）的租赁活跃度：统计每家门店库存被租出的总次数，并按次数降序排列
sql: SELECT i.store_id AS 门店ID, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS 租出总次数 FROM public.rental r JOIN public.inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id GROUP BY i.store_id ORDER BY 租出总次数 DESC;

question: 查询2005年6月所有租赁记录中，租期（归还时间减租赁时间）超过7天的明细，显示租赁ID、客户ID、租赁日期、归还日期、租期天数
sql: SELECT r.rental_id AS 租赁ID, r.customer_id AS 客户ID, r.rental_date AS 租赁日期, r.return_date AS 归还日期, (r.return_date - r.rental_date) AS 租期天数 FROM public.rental r WHERE r.rental_date >= '2005-06-01' AND r.rental_date < '2005-07-01' AND r.return_date IS NOT NULL AND (r.return_date - r.rental_date) > INTERVAL '7 days';

question: 对比不同客户等级（按累计租赁次数划分：≥10次为VIP，5-9次为优质，1-4次为普通）的客户数量分布
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN cnt >= 10 THEN 'VIP' WHEN cnt >= 5 THEN '优质客户' ELSE '普通客户' END AS 客户等级, COUNT(*) AS 客户数量 FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM public.rental GROUP BY customer_id) t GROUP BY 客户等级 ORDER BY 客户等级;

question: 找出租赁频次最高的前3部影片（通过inventory和film关联），显示影片ID、片名、总租赁次数
sql: SELECT f.film_id AS 影片ID, f.title AS 片名, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS 总租赁次数 FROM public.rental r JOIN public.inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id JOIN public.film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id GROUP BY f.film_id, f.title ORDER BY 总租赁次数 DESC LIMIT 3;

question: 统计每天的租赁发起量和归还量（分离统计），结果按日期升序排列，仅包含2005年5月的数据
sql: SELECT COALESCE(r1.day, r2.day) AS 日期, COALESCE(r1.租赁量, 0) AS 租赁发起量, COALESCE(r2.归还量, 0) AS 归还量 FROM (SELECT DATE(rental_date) AS day, COUNT(*) AS 租赁量 FROM public.rental WHERE rental_date >= '2005-05-01' AND rental_date < '2005-06-01' GROUP BY DATE(rental_date)) r1 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT DATE(return_date) AS day, COUNT(*) AS 归还量 FROM public.rental WHERE return_date >= '2005-05-01' AND return_date < '2005-06-01' GROUP BY DATE(return_date)) r2 ON r1.day = r2.day ORDER BY 日期;

question: 查询所有由员工ID为2处理、且客户ID为137的租赁记录，要求返回租赁ID、库存ID、租赁时间、归还时间（若未归还则显示'尚未归还'）
sql: SELECT rental_id AS 租赁ID, inventory_id AS 库存ID, rental_date AS 租赁时间, COALESCE(return_date::TEXT, '尚未归还') AS 归还时间 FROM public.rental WHERE staff_id = 2 AND customer_id = 137;

question: 识别存在异常租赁行为的客户：同一客户在同一天内租赁超过3次，列出客户ID、日期、当日租赁次数
sql: SELECT customer_id AS 客户ID, DATE(rental_date) AS 日期, COUNT(*) AS 当日租赁次数 FROM public.rental GROUP BY customer_id, DATE(rental_date) HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY 当日租赁次数 DESC;

question: 查询2007年每月的总收款金额，并按月份升序排列
sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) AS 年份, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM payment_date) AS 月份, SUM(amount) AS 总收款金额 FROM public.payment WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) = 2007 GROUP BY 年份, 月份 ORDER BY 年份, 月份;

question: 找出收款金额最高的前5位员工（按姓名显示），及其对应总收款额
sql: SELECT s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS 员工姓名, SUM(p.amount) AS 总收款额 FROM public.payment p JOIN public.staff s ON p.staff_id = s.staff_id GROUP BY s.staff_id, s.first_name, s.last_name ORDER BY 总收款额 DESC LIMIT 5;

question: 统计每位客户累计支付总额，仅显示总额超过100元的客户，并按金额降序排列
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS 客户姓名, SUM(p.amount) AS 累计支付总额 FROM public.payment p JOIN public.customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name HAVING SUM(p.amount) > 100 ORDER BY 累计支付总额 DESC;

question: 查询2007年2月15日当天所有支付记录，包含客户姓名、员工姓名、租赁ID和支付金额
sql: SELECT c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS 客户姓名, s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS 员工姓名, p.rental_id AS 租赁ID, p.amount AS 支付金额 FROM public.payment p JOIN public.customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN public.staff s ON p.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE DATE(p.payment_date) = '2007-02-15' ORDER BY p.payment_date;

question: 对比2006年与2007年全年总收款金额及交易笔数
sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) AS 年份, COUNT(*) AS 交易笔数, SUM(amount) AS 总收款金额 FROM public.payment WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) IN (2006, 2007) GROUP BY 年份 ORDER BY 年份;

question: 列出每家门店（通过员工所属门店）的年度收款总额，按2007年降序排列
sql: SELECT st.store_id AS 店铺ID, SUM(p.amount) AS "2007年收款总额" FROM public.payment p JOIN public.staff st ON p.staff_id = st.staff_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.payment_date) = 2007 GROUP BY st.store_id ORDER BY "2007年收款总额" DESC;

question: 查询支付金额大于平均值的所有记录，返回客户ID、员工ID、支付金额和支付时间
sql: SELECT customer_id AS 客户ID, staff_id AS 员工ID, amount AS 支付金额, payment_date AS 支付时间 FROM public.payment WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM public.payment);

question: 统计各小时段（0-23点）的支付笔数与平均金额，仅保留笔数超过50的时段
sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM payment_date) AS 小时段, COUNT(*) AS 支付笔数, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS 平均支付金额 FROM public.payment GROUP BY 小时段 HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY 小时段;

question: 找出在同一天内为同一客户处理超过3笔支付的员工（姓名），及其对应日期和笔数
sql: SELECT s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS 员工姓名, DATE(p.payment_date) AS 支付日期, COUNT(*) AS 当日支付笔数 FROM public.payment p JOIN public.staff s ON p.staff_id = s.staff_id GROUP BY s.staff_id, s.first_name, s.last_name, DATE(p.payment_date) HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY 支付日期, 当日支付笔数 DESC;

question: 计算每位客户最近一次支付的时间、金额及对应员工姓名
sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name || ' ' || c.last_name AS 客户姓名, MAX(p.payment_date) AS 最近支付时间, (SELECT amount FROM public.payment p2 WHERE p2.customer_id = c.customer_id ORDER BY payment_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS 最近支付金额, (SELECT s2.first_name || ' ' || s2.last_name FROM public.payment p2 JOIN public.staff s2 ON p2.staff_id = s2.staff_id WHERE p2.customer_id = c.customer_id ORDER BY p2.payment_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS 处理员工姓名 FROM public.payment p JOIN public.customer c ON p.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name;
